{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215244EB678259A982F193BE6F"}"},"total":2932},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7360343587714892569","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的反派文的一个新套路，无系统打有系统挺牛的就是不知道为什么看完之后心里感觉空落落的，也许是跟作者差不多吧，想把自己当成顾天行的那样的人，但现实中自己却只是里面的天命或者一个配角，在此希望作者能开个后续吧。毕竟他曾经自己说过呀，希望能实现诺言吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713715451,"group_id":"7186219400632994850","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人之初，性本善，性相近，习相远，子不教，性乃焉。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5PGJTnIyfvxseWWk1YwkawaYhV5g7HGjB8b2cEDxNvG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b1328abf22c24ecf98c0015e39d3208d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617689&x-signature=7bY7APip7dHkjxK56rBCMutg%2FN8%3D","user_id":"3316601569418624","user_name":"梦道之祖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3316601569418624","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186219400632994850","book_info":{"abstract":"（反派+霸道+无情+无敌+谋略+无系统）
我，顾天行，天命大反派，
这个世间从来没有对错，没有彻底的恶，也没有虚伪的善，
那些带着系统，带着金手指一路冲天的主角，那个不是破坏天地规则之人。
“顾天行，你这个魔鬼，你我同乡，共同来自蓝星，尽然还要残害与我，我可曾得罪过你”许德愤怒大吼，他来自蓝星，身怀系统，而今即将被眼前顾家少主抽骨扒皮，就因为对方看中了他的系统。
“顾天行，你杀我三十徒弟，我张玄与你不公戴天”张玄声嘶力竭，目光恨意滔天，他的脑海中一尊书院空间轰隆转动。
“顾天行，我李凡不问世事，而今当世无敌，你顾家当真要与我对立”出世及无敌，李凡被系统训练了一千年，走的时候，系统告诉他已经无敌了，在某个清晨，一位叫顾天行的男子走进了他的庄园。
“为何，没有为何，我既然知道就不能无视，顾某对付你们无需理由，要说对错，那就只因我生在顾家”顾天行目光默然，在这乱世之中，他没有系统，没有金手指。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5eb3cbfec71858491de6a59334c692fb","author":"李晓暮","author_id":"","book_id":"7186219400632994850","book_name":"我若叫出大帝老祖，阁下如何应对","book_short_name":"天行灭世","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300800","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7186223281521820195","read_count":"26554","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2530251"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1176","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,反派,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/47789a9226babc5d5f68225c24261e00~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285165&x-signature=bQ7WwNDxNnzfaWMIXEhyr%2FGn1lQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99126733104","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1048"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215244EB678259A982F193BE6F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读121小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":283695,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":436065,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8045},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7308068180877181696","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，说是反派，全程没有毒点。也没有其他那些反派文的啰嗦跟很多没必要的描写。其他反派文很多都喜欢水外貌描写，水心里话，看的恶心。该燃的时候燃，而且不会像小白文那样燃的那么尴尬。看过那么多小说从来没觉得有哪本小说可以比的，哪怕是斗破苍穹跟完美世界来了都没用。而且其他小说越到后面就会给人一种疲劳感，完全不想继续看的，这本书完全没有这种感觉，只会看不够。八点多的评分真的配不上这本书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701548545,"group_id":"7186219400632994850","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手勿喷，有很多不懂的请多关照","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwBiWczNFyVKm7qwYJ0iqYQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/b0d8b59b04ea4d81ad662df6253aabcc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618822&x-signature=0MhlEBTylHKEWsrATH8iiVcRqXU%3D","user_id":"857207611603764","user_name":"蒸虾头123456"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"857207611603764","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649417070,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186219400632994850","book_info":{"abstract":"（反派+霸道+无情+无敌+谋略+无系统）

44EB678259A982F193BE6F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":166213,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":26060},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7195921603862659898","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，和别的反派文不一样，主角不喜欢收女主，而且这书气运之子比别的反派文都恶心，主角得杀半天，很现实，我喜欢这种。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675431157,"group_id":"7186219400632994850","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz2rByVllsJyumWxTEPeJ7QzXuRTbrsRMsWJWFhd8ZvG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/16748235a1ba40209e589ec0bef72374~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619830&x-signature=YfzND%2Fdi5SxX0XHAsO8Lo5nF6dA%3D","user_id":"3562006525772423","user_name":"小玄先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3562006525772423","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7186219400632994850","book_info":{"abstract":"（反派+霸道+无情+无敌+谋略+无系统）
